Bluetooth control, storage management, compliance tests, device information, address management, and pairing functions.


## Files
- **[bluetooth_ctl.c](bluetooth_ctl.c.md)**: Manages Bluetooth control, including initialization, state changes, and airplane mode handling.
- **[bluetooth_ctl.h](bluetooth_ctl.h.md)**: Header file for controlling Bluetooth state, including airplane mode and override settings.
- **[bluetooth_persistent_storage.h](bluetooth_persistent_storage.h.md)**: Header file for managing Bluetooth persistent storage, including BLE and BT Classic pairing operations, local device info, and remote device capabilities.
- **[bluetooth_persistent_storage_debug.c](bluetooth_persistent_storage_debug.c.md)**: Debug functions for pretty-printing Bluetooth pairing information and root keys from storage.
- **[bluetooth_persistent_storage_debug.h](bluetooth_persistent_storage_debug.h.md)**: Debug functions for dumping Bluetooth pairing and root key information.
- **[bluetooth_prompt.c](bluetooth_prompt.c.md)**: Functions for Bluetooth address manipulation, device name setting, test modes, and preference management.
- **[bonding.c](bonding.c.md)**: Handles Bluetooth bonding creation, including address pinning, flag logging, and connection association.
- **[bt_compliance_tests.c](bt_compliance_tests.c.md)**: Bluetooth compliance test functions for starting, stopping, and managing test modes.
- **[bt_compliance_tests.h](bt_compliance_tests.h.md)**: Bluetooth compliance test functions for starting, stopping, and entering HCI passthrough mode.
- **[dis.c](dis.c.md)**: Implements functions to set and retrieve Bluetooth Device Information Service (DIS) data.
- **[dis.h](dis.h.md)**: Defines the DisInfo structure and a function to retrieve device information.
- **[local_addr.c](local_addr.c.md)**: Manages Bluetooth local address cycling and pinning for device bonding and pairing operations.
- **[local_addr.h](local_addr.h.md)**: Functions for managing the cycling and pinning of local Bluetooth device addresses.
- **[local_id.c](local_id.c.md)**: Manages Bluetooth local identity, including device name and address configuration and caching.
- **[local_id.h](local_id.h.md)**: Functions for configuring and retrieving the local Bluetooth device name and address.
- **[pairability.c](pairability.c.md)**: Manages Bluetooth pairability and connectability states with reference counting and timers.
- **[pairability.h](pairability.h.md)**: Functions for managing Bluetooth pairability and discoverability in BT Classic and BLE modes.
- **[pebble_pairing_service.c](pebble_pairing_service.c.md)**: Handles Bluetooth connection parameters and remote management settings for Pebble pairing.
- **[pp_ble_control.c](pp_ble_control.c.md)**: Handles Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) control commands for setting devices as discoverable and pairable.
- **[pp_ble_control.h](pp_ble_control.h.md)**: Defines a callback function for handling Bluetooth protocol messages in a communication session.
